name: Destiny HERO - Dusktopia
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ－ＨＥＲＯ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>デステニーヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ダスクユートピアガイ
desc:
1 "Destiny HERO" Fusion Monster + 1 "Destiny HERO" monster
If this card is Fusion Summoned: You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Material. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 monster on the field; until the end of this turn, it cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects, and neither player takes any battle damage from attacks involving that monster.
mnst_eff:
1 "Destiny HERO" Fusion Monster + 1 "Destiny HERO" monster
If this card is Fusion Summoned: You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Material. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 monster on the field; until the end of this turn, it cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects, and neither player takes any battle damage from attacks involving that monster.
eff:

Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 monster on the field; until the end of this turn, it cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects, and neither player takes any battle damage from attacks involving that monster.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
summoning: Requires Fusion Monsters as Fusion Materials
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
